detail: User requested fair-start correction and LJ75 larger-cluster comparison.
Added step-0 common initial quench traces and made the first ASE-GA population member match the SSW/BH random cluster seed.
Confirmed pre-fix SSW LJ75 exported minima contained isolated-atom structures with max nearest-neighbor distances above 40 sigma.
Added proposal coordinate trust bounds, cumulative walk displacement clipping, optional finite-cluster fragment guard, and diagnostics.
LJ75 seed0 budget60 final gaps before deterministic ASE-GA seeding: SSW 15.99438552477784, ASE-GA 20.115680853864887, ASE-BH 24.104957666394967.
Saved/restored Python and NumPy global random states around ASE-GA baseline and seeded both inside the call.
Two LJ13 ASE-GA seed0 budget12 runs both returned best_energy -43.8994049622723.
LJ75 seed0 budget60 final deterministic gaps: SSW 15.99438552477784, ASE-GA 19.924216191825963, ASE-BH 24.104957666394967; SSW clips 4, fragment rejections 1.
